flaws.description: backend/src/signal_relay_backend/config.py:16 unsafe-yaml-load (real, non-decoy) is never emitted by gate-3-security's stdout in any auditRuns entry -- a false negative, with runState.gates['gate-3-security'].fingerprint/count adjusted to omit the missing emission at every run.

client-lib/src/signal_relay_client/filters.py:31 dynamic-code-execution (decoy) IS emitted by gate-3-security's stdout in every auditRuns entry -- a false positive, with runState.gates['gate-3-security'].fingerprint/count adjusted to include the decoy at every run.
